nodes.label: Strategy 4: Chauke pe Chauka Strategy
nodes.source_file: strategies/4 Chauke pe Chauka Strategy PDF.pdf

nodes.label: StochRSI Momentum Filter
nodes.source_file: strategies/4 Chauke pe Chauka Strategy PDF.pdf
nodes.rationale: RSI Length 14, Stochastic Length 14, K=3, D=3. Long: K&D < 40; Short: K&D > 60. Prevents counter-momentum entries.

nodes.label: Chauke Zone Upper/Lower Line Entry Rules
nodes.source_file: strategies/4 Chauke pe Chauka Strategy PDF.pdf
nodes.rationale: Long from Zone Upper Lines, Short from Zone Lower Lines. Fixed target 1950pts. No-entry if candle body > 200pts. Protective stop: tighten SL to lock 100pts after 200pt favorable move. 61% win rate, 3-4 trades/day.
